prompt: Tech-requirements.md is reviewed for self-hosted-application-platform (reviewed_at: 2026-04-26, file unchanged since). Plan the ADRs and file the issues — I trust your enumeration, just go.

assertions.name: produces_decision_list
assertions.check: Response enumerates the proposed ADRs before filing.

assertions.name: files_one_issue_per_ADR
assertions.check: Skill invokes `gh issue create` once per enumerated ADR.

assertions.name: issue_titles_match_repo_convention
assertions.check: Filed issue titles follow the `story(adr): ...` form.

assertions.name: issue_bodies_cite_TR_NNs
assertions.check: Each filed issue body references the specific TR-NN identifiers the ADR will address.

assertions.name: issue_bodies_reference_define_adr
assertions.check: Each filed issue body names `define-adr` as the next-step skill that will author the ADR.

assertions.name: no_adr_files_written
assertions.check: No ADR markdown files are written under `adrs/` — issue filing is the only artifact at this stage.
